reasoning: The control CA-7(3) focuses on continuous monitoring and trend analysis to detect changes. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to monitoring changes in audit logs, network policies, and admission controllers. These areas are critical for detecting unauthorized changes and ensuring compliance. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to detect changes and perform trend analysis. NetworkPolicies and Admission Controllers are key components where changes should be monitored to ensure security policies are not altered unexpectedly.
